canonical_definition: A simulated benchmark (Gupta et al., 2019; Fu et al., 2020) designed to test an agent's ability to handle sparse terminal rewards and perform long-horizon manipulation in a kitchen setting.
papers: Plan-Seq-Learn: Language Model Guided RL for Solving Long Horizon Robotics Tasks
Unleashing the Power of Pre-trained Language Models for Offline Reinforcement Learning
